decision.summary: No new action: the active daily 79k reach remains the cleanest live trade, and there is still no second daily or weekly opportunity with enough edge to add.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. BTC spot is 78101.44, still pressing the upper end of the daily range, with short-term Binance bias bullish and no decisive rollover. The active daily 79k reach remains alive at roughly 39.5%, so the primary daily slot is still correctly occupied by the closest upside strike. The nearest bearish alternative, 77k dip at roughly 25.5%, is weaker and would require a meaningful downside reversal against the live intraday tape. The next bullish same-day strike, 80k reach, is only around 9.5% and too far/weak to justify occupying the second daily slot. Weekly markets remain unusable because only 12 hours are left in the weekly period and the visible weekly upside targets are also weak. The disciplined move is to keep holding the active 79k reach and avoid forcing another trade.
